title: Sour Tender Vegan Tomato Stir-fry
description: A romantic Uruguayan dish featuring a blend of savory and tangy flavors with the addition of aromatic bouquet garni for an extra layer of depth.

ingredients.name: onion
ingredients.notes: Sliced thinly for a tender texture

ingredients.name: bouquet garni
ingredients.notes: Including parsley, thyme, bay leaf, and a star anise or two for depth

ingredients.name: vinegar
ingredients.notes: Best with sherry vinegar for authentic taste

ingredients.name: olive oil
ingredients.notes: Use to sauté ingredients and deglaze pan after cooking vegetables

instructions: Heat a large skillet over medium heat. Add olive oil, butter (or vegan alternative), and minced garlic cloves.
Sauté the onion until translucent, then add finely sliced bell peppers. Stir occasionally for about 5 minutes.
Gradually add tomatoes and vinegar to the pan while stirring continuously. The mixture should start to thicken slightly.
Add the bouquet garni to the pot along with salt to taste. Continue cooking for an additional minute or two until everything is well combined.
Reduce heat to low, cover the skillet, and let it simmer gently for about 5 more minutes to let flavors meld together.
Serve hot over steamed basmati rice or gluten-free pasta as a side dish.
